title: Imperial College London
summary: Xuhan earned a B.Eng. in Electronic and Information Engineering at Imperial College London with a 3.9/4.0 GPA, building foundations in signals, systems, hardware, software engineering, control, and machine learning.
summary_zh: 叙涵在帝国理工学院完成电子与信息工程学士学位，GPA 3.9/4.0，建立了信号、系统、硬件、软件工程、控制和机器学习基础。

title: University of Southern California
summary: Xuhan is pursuing an M.S. in Computer Science with an Artificial Intelligence focus at USC, with coursework and projects in AI, deep learning, LLMs, computer vision, and web technologies.
summary_zh: 叙涵在南加州大学攻读计算机科学硕士，人工智能方向，课程和项目覆盖 AI、深度学习、大语言模型、计算机视觉和 Web 技术。

title: AI Voice-Interaction Terminal
summary: At Shenzhen Banying Suixing Technology, Xuhan worked on an AI companion and learning terminal using ESP32-CAM, MediaPipe hand landmarks, PaddleOCR, LLM response planning, and fish-speech streaming TTS. He improved speech-service concurrency by 70%.
summary_zh: 在深圳伴影随行科技，叙涵参与 AI 陪伴与学习终端，使用 ESP32-CAM、MediaPipe 手部关键点、PaddleOCR、LLM 回复规划和 fish-speech 流式 TTS，并将语音服务并发性能提升 70%。

title: Tencent AI Arena
summary: At Tencent AI Arena, Xuhan built backend and AI features for an education game platform serving about 100,000 active learners. He used Prefix Tuning for fixed-format LLM outputs and Policy Gradient reinforcement learning for football-simulation AI players.
summary_zh: 在腾讯 AI Arena，叙涵为约 100,000 活跃学习者的教育游戏平台开发后端和 AI 功能，使用 Prefix Tuning 生成固定格式 LLM 输出，并用 Policy Gradient 强化学习训练足球模拟 AI 玩家。

title: Multimodal Sarcasm Recognition
summary: Xuhan built a MUStARD-based sarcasm recognition project using text, audio, video, Transformer fine-tuning, Whisper-style audio paths, and LLM-assisted analysis with Qwen, Gemini, and GPT-style methods.
summary_zh: 叙涵基于 MUStARD 构建多模态讽刺识别项目，使用文本、音频、视频、Transformer 微调、Whisper 风格音频路径，以及 Qwen、Gemini、GPT 风格的 LLM 辅助分析。

title: Computer Vision K-Means Lab
title_zh: 计算机视觉 K-Means 实验
summary: Xuhan implemented Laws texture features, PCA projections, K-means texture segmentation, SVM comparison, SIFT matching, and Bag-of-Words codebooks for a USC computer vision project.
summary_zh: 叙涵在 USC 计算机视觉项目中实现 Laws 纹理特征、PCA 投影、K-means 纹理分割、SVM 对比、SIFT 匹配和 Bag-of-Words 码本。

title: Real Estate Demand Forecasting
summary: Xuhan built lag and rolling-window features for monthly real-estate demand prediction and compared XGBoost, LightGBM, seasonal baselines, Temporal Fusion Transformer variants, and weighted ensembles.
summary_zh: 叙涵为月度房地产需求预测构建滞后特征和滚动窗口特征，并比较 XGBoost、LightGBM、季节性基线、Temporal Fusion Transformer 变体和加权集成。

title: Deep Learning Fault Detection Research
title_zh: 深度学习故障检测研究
summary: At Imperial College, Xuhan researched deep learning methods for computer fault detection, including GAN, CGAN, ACGAN, WGAN, VAE, CNN, RNN, reinforcement learning, and transfer learning directions.
summary_zh: 在帝国理工，叙涵研究计算机故障检测的深度学习方法，覆盖 GAN、CGAN、ACGAN、WGAN、VAE、CNN、RNN、强化学习和迁移学习。

title: Machine Learning Visualization
summary: Xuhan built browser-based ML simulators for classic and modern AI topics, including linear regression, K-means, KNN, SVM kernels, decision trees, GMM/EM, Transformer attention, RAG, LoRA, CNN feature maps, and speech spectrograms.
summary_zh: 叙涵构建了浏览器端机器学习模拟器，覆盖线性回归、K-means、KNN、SVM 核方法、决策树、GMM/EM、Transformer 注意力、RAG、LoRA、CNN 特征图和语音频谱。

title: FPGA Multiplayer Ping-Pong Game
summary: Xuhan built a two-player FPGA ping-pong game with Verilog logic, TCP/IP networking, AWS EC2 synchronization, and Unity 3D visualization.
summary_zh: 叙涵构建了双人 FPGA 乒乓游戏，包含 Verilog 逻辑、TCP/IP 联网、AWS EC2 同步和 Unity 3D 展示。

title: C90 to RISC-V Compiler
title_zh: C90 到 RISC-V 编译器
summary: Xuhan implemented compiler components for lexical analysis, parsing, AST construction, and RISC-V assembly generation for C90 programs.
summary_zh: 叙涵实现了 C90 编译器组件，包括词法分析、语法分析、AST 构建和 RISC-V 汇编生成。

title: BOSS Multi-Way Join Engine
title_zh: BOSS 多路 Join 引擎
summary: Xuhan implemented hash join and sort-merge join operators for a composable C++ query-processing engine and compared scaling behavior on multi-way equi-joins.
summary_zh: 叙涵为可组合 C++ 查询处理引擎实现 hash join 和 sort-merge join 算子，并比较多路等值连接的扩展行为。

title: Maze-Solving Balancing Robot
summary: Xuhan designed the algorithmic stack for a two-wheel balancing robot, including balance control, dead reckoning, line detection, and shortest-path maze navigation.
summary_zh: 叙涵设计两轮平衡机器人的算法栈，包括平衡控制、航位推算、线检测和最短路径迷宫导航。

title: Research Notes and Interests
summary: Xuhan's research notes focus on LLM alignment, multimodal learning, speech models, efficient fine-tuning, RAG, LoRA, and production-facing ML systems.
summary_zh: 叙涵的研究笔记关注 LLM alignment、多模态学习、语音模型、高效微调、RAG、LoRA 和面向生产系统的机器学习。
